description_long: This is a dark, ceramic vase with a bulbous body and a wide, flared mouth. The surface is adorned with subtle, wavy incised lines encircling the upper portion, adding a decorative touch. A single, thick handle with a twisted rope-like texture extends from the neck to the shoulder of the vase. The back of the vase features an elaborate, vertically aligned relief pattern, possibly inspired by traditional motifs. The finish is matte with visible textural variations, giving it an aged, handcrafted appearance. The overall form is elegant and functional, suitable for holding water or flowers.
description: A dark, matte ceramic vase with a flared mouth, twisted handle, and wavy incised patterns, featuring ornate relief on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flared mouth, twisted handle on the left, and wavy incised lines around the upper body.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting the vase's symmetrical, rounded body and the absence of the handle.
description_view_2: Angled view with the handle on the right, displaying both the incised patterns and the handle's rope-like texture.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the ornate vertical relief pattern and the full length of the handle.
attribute_pattern: wavy incised lines and vertical relief motifs
